---
title: "Sign Up to Participate"
subtitle: "Interested in bringing high-impact tutoring to your school?"
---

CSC and Bellwether will hold regular virtual information sessions for school and district leaders throughout May and June. Attendees will be able to learn more about the program and the study, hear directly from initiative and study team members, and ask any questions they have. All schools and districts are asked to attend a session or speak one-on-one with CSC and Bellwether before committing to participation. Sign up to attend a session below:

[Sign Up for an Info Session](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeTgu3oGdCVhwRVHJv8XTcQGyZUOG3bUPnm4HT57kExdKlkuw/viewform){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

We hope to see you soon!
